query: vaginal cylinder brachytherapy dose error applicator size dosimetry

results.title: Image-based multichannel vaginal cylinder brachytherapy for vaginal cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 25456026. 2015/01/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To investigate the clinical feasibility and treatment outcomes of 
image-based high-dose-rate (HDR) brachytherapy using an intracavitary 
multichannel vaginal cylinder for the definitive treatment of vaginal cancers.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: A total of 41 patients with vaginal cancer (24% primary 
vaginal and 76% recurrence from other gynecologic primaries) treated with 
definitive radiotherapy ± chemotherapy including image-based HDR brachytherapy

results.title: Detection of air gaps around the cylinder by postinsertion computed tomography in vaginal cuff brachytherapy: A prospective series, systematic review, and meta-analysis.
